_comment: H100 idle auto-kill guard — roadmap cluster #34 improvement (23). Motivation: 2-day H100 idle cost $143 recently. Probes each pod, compares last-activity to threshold, emits STOP (or invokes runpodctl stop when --apply).
override_note: shared/ is gitignored; place site-local overrides there and pass --config <path> to use them.
notes: raw#9 deterministic: thresholds + probe_cmd fixed by config
raw#12 no cherry-pick: iterates pods in config order; no re-sort
